description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden cabinet with a natural light brown finish, featuring two vertically aligned doors on the front. The doors are equipped with metallic handles, positioned centrally for easy access. Below the doors, there are three horizontal drawers, each with its own handle, providing additional storage space. The cabinet stands on a slightly protruding base, giving it stability and a classic appearance. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or decorative elements. This type of cabinet is commonly used for storage in urban environments such as garages, offices, or residential hallways.
description: A tall, light brown wooden cabinet with two front doors and three lower drawers, featuring metallic handles and a sturdy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing two doors with metallic handles and three drawers beneath, all accessible from this side.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, flat wooden surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless wooden back panel, with no handles, doors, or drawers visible.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain wooden surface and no interactive elements.
